name: Houston
content: I visited Houston for a large research conference once. Two things happened: the first was that it was very hot in November, at around 25 C (80 F) average on most days. The second thing was that the conference venue had forgotten to notify the local bars and restaurants about the influx of people into the downtown area, so every place I went to was understaffed (normally the venue would let shops know about events in advance, so that they could staff accordingly). I enjoyed my time in Houston.
